# Octagon Security

> Commercial & residential security systems installed across South Florida.

Octagon Security designs and installs security systems for homes and businesses in Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach Counties, Florida.

## Services

- Home & business security system installation
- Security cameras & video surveillance
- Burglar alarm systems with 24/7 monitoring
- Fire alarm installation, testing & inspections
- Access control & keyless entry
- Structured cabling & network infrastructure
- Warehouse & industrial security

## Service area

Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, and surrounding South Florida communities.

## Contact

- Phone: 786-928-0986
- Website: https://www.octagonsecured.com/
- Florida license: EF0000848
- ETL / UL listed
